description: Toggle calculations for plotting joint planes. This setting controls the calculation of data structures used for plotting joint planes. The data structure takes time to calculate and uses a lot of memory. Eliminating this calculation affects plotting only; it does not affect any mechanical calculations.

keywords.name: tolerance
keywords.description: Set tolerance for merging nodes. If nodes are closer together than f , they will be merged. The default is 0.1 times the block tolerance ( block tolerance ).

keywords.name: new
keywords.description: Toggle use of new joint plotting algorithm. Default is \(on\) .
